response: Founded in 1861, MIT is currently ranked as the #1 university and boasts a massive $24.6 billion endowment along with a prestigious legacy of 98 Nobel laureates. The highly competitive institution has a strict 3.9% acceptance rate and charges an annual tuition of $57,590. To maintain its standard of academic excellence, MIT employs a dedicated faculty of 1,069 to educate its population of 11,500 students.
